alert: The web tier is bypassing cache and product page latency is high.
root_cause: web server cache host configuration is wrong

evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:web_server: Web logs show cache connection failures to the wrong host.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:web_server:CACHE_HOST: Web CACHE_HOST points at the wrong endpoint.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:cache: Cache metrics show very low traffic despite web demand.

logs: WARN cache connection failed host=cache-old.internal reason=dns_error
INFO falling back to database for product reads

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(web server cache host configuration is wrong, update web cache host)
distractors: Restarting cache does not fix the web tier pointing at the wrong cache host.
